full_text:
Sun Chu (Zijing) 孫楚 (子荊)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Chu (孫楚), styledZijing (子荊), was born in Taiyuan. A highly talented man who stood out but also annoyed a lot of people. Poet. Sun Chu was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Sun Chu lived during the Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
